cases.notes: Vendored Noto Naskh Arabic changes the visual-order glyph sequence for سلام beyond pure RTL reordering of raw cmap glyph IDs, the ticket-local arabic-gsub-trace dump now records the runtime init/fina lookup chain that changes those glyph IDs, the ticket-local arabic-shaped-glyph-run dump pins the resulting RTL-ordered clusters, and the ticket-local arabic-shaping-plan dump records the required Arabic default feature set for that bounded row without promoting full Arabic support.

Vendored Noto Naskh Arabic proves a bounded base-plus-mark case by tying the positioning or zero-advance check to the mark cluster itself, the ticket-local arabic-gpos-trace dump now records the runtime mark attachment lookup and attachment vector for that row, the ticket-local arabic-shaped-glyph-run dump pins the resulting RTL-ordered clusters, and the ticket-local arabic-shaping-plan dump records the required Arabic default feature set and refusal-on-missing expectations for that bounded case.

Reviewed repo fixture gpos-missing-gdef.otf keeps Arabic base-plus-mark input on the stable generic gdef-required refusal path instead of approximating mark attachment without glyph classification data, and the ticket-local arabic-gpos-trace dump now pins the empty-lookup diagnostic row for that bounded refusal.
Single-run shaping emits the paragraph-owned bidi diagnostic instead of silently approximating mixed Arabic/LTR layout, while still returning shaped output.

Ticket-local subset font arabic-lam-alef.otf shapes the logical lam-alef sequence with GSUB glyph changes beyond raw cmap visual-order reordering, while the absence of GPOS tables emits the reviewed arabic-cursive-unsupported and arabic-mark-unsupported diagnostics as fixture-bounded refusal evidence.

Ticket-local subset font arabic-marks-cursive.otf shapes lam-meem with GSUB joining-form init/medi substitution and GPOS mark-to-base positioning on the bounded open-type runtime path, providing positive evidence for Arabic GSUB joining and GPOS mark attachment without promoting full Arabic cursive attachment.

Ticket-local refusal seed font arabic-missing-cursive.otf shapes beh with GSUB init/medi/fina lookups for joining forms but no GPOS table, emitting the reviewed text.shaping.arabic-cursive-unsupported diagnostic as fixture-bounded cursive refusal evidence.

Ticket-local refusal seed font arabic-missing-mark.otf shapes alef-fatha with GSUB fina substitution but no GPOS table, emitting the reviewed text.shaping.arabic-mark-unsupported diagnostic as fixture-bounded mark refusal evidence.

remainingGates.detail: The full required Arabic feature set (rlig, liga, calt, isol, and cursive attachment via GPOS curs) is not yet proven by ticket-local reviewed runtime evidence on dedicated fixture fonts; the current fixture wave proves init, medi, fina, mark, mkmk, and basic refusal paths.
